lessons.title: Red, Blue and Pink
lessons.topic: Basic colors and sounds of P and Q

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What color is the sky on a clear sunny day?
questions.hint: It's the same color as the ocean.

questions.question_text: What sound does the letter 'Q' make?
questions.hint: Think of the start sound of 'queen'.

questions.question_text: Which of these is a color of cotton candy?
questions.hint: It's a color often seen with Valentine's hearts.

steps.title: The Colorful Garden
steps.text: Look at the garden! The pig is pink. The sky is blue. The queen has a red dress. I like blue.

questions.question: What is the color of the queen's dress?

steps.explanation: Use this to say what color you like.

steps.audio_text: The pig has a pink hat. The queen looks and asks, 'Is it a pink hat?'

questions.question: What color is the pig's hat?
What does the queen ask about the hat?
options: Do you see a red bird?
Do you like the blue car?

questions.question_text: The pig is ___. (Grammar question)
What color is the sky on a sunny day? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: A queen wears a crown. (Reading comprehension question)
Which word starts with the letter 'P'? (Vocabulary question)

lessons.title: Green and Yellow
lessons.topic: Nature colors and the sound of R

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What color are the leaves in summer?
questions.hint: It's a color that rhymes with 'seen'.

questions.question_text: Which creature hops and is green?
What fruit is yellow and you peel it?
questions.hint: This fruit is long and monkeys love it.

steps.title: Fun in the Green Park
steps.text: The grass is green. A rabbit runs fast. The sun is yellow. I like yellow flowers. Is it a rabbit?

steps.explanation: Use 'I like' to say what you enjoy.

steps.audio_text: The rabbit runs in the green grass and sees a yellow flower. It stops to enjoy the sun.

questions.question: Does the rabbit stop to enjoy the sun?

questions.question_text: I like ___ color green. (Grammar question)
Which animal can run fast? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: The rabbit is yellow. (Reading comprehension question)
What color is the grass? (Vocabulary question)
Complete the sentence: I like ___. (Grammar question)

lessons.title: Black and Orange
lessons.topic: Dark colors and sounds of S and T

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which fruit is round and orange?
questions.hint: It's also the name of its color.

questions.question_text: Which animal is black and white and says 'moo'?
questions.hint: This animal lives on a farm and gives us milk.

questions.question_text: Which animal hops and has long ears?

items.example: Is it yellow like the sun?

steps.title: Colors Everywhere
steps.text: The sun is bright and yellow. I see a big orange tiger in the jungle. The tiger walks by and says hello. Look, there are ten oranges on the tree!

questions.question: How many oranges are on the tree?

steps.explanation: Use this to say what color something is.

steps.audio_text: Let's look at the sunny park. A small bird is sitting on a black swing. Listen to the sounds of the swings and trees.

questions.question_text: What color are the tiger's stripes? (Reading comprehension question)
Is it the sun? (Grammar question)
Which number comes after nine? (Vocabulary question)
Fill in the blank: The sunset was ___. (using topic words)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What color is the sky on a clear day?
questions.hint: This color is also in the ocean.

questions.question_text: Which fruit is usually red?
questions.hint: This fruit can also be green or yellow.

questions.question_text: What do bees make?

steps.title: Colors in the Garden
steps.text: I am Mia. I like purple and green. The flower is purple. The leaf is green. Is it green? Yes, it is!

steps.audio_text: Look at the big orange pumpkin. Is the pumpkin orange? Yes, I like orange pumpkins!

questions.question: Does the speaker like orange pumpkins?

questions.question_text: The cat is ___. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'banana'? (Vocabulary question)
Is the apple red? (Grammar pattern question)
I like ___. (Reading comprehension based on previous lessons)
True or False: 'The sun is blue.'
